According to the [Refined Criteria] and the strict rules provided, the use of lipid-lowering pharmacotherapy alone is a secondary, supportive factor, but it is NOT sufficient to predict a future diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" if explicit diagnostic coding is absent.
